examples: He began to grumble. From grumbling, he passed into banditry.
To be sure, the rebel forces are often no kinder, and banditry is rife.
Chivalry and Banditry have been in existence as a nongovernmental force for generations in the history of China.
But elsewhere, impoverished militia groups appear to be reverting to old ways - turning to banditry and extortion.
In recent weeks, activists have mounted an online campaign accusing Ahmed Afash, a prominent commander based in Aleppo, of banditry and kidnapping.
